response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of professional C/C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus a university thesis project, far short of the 5-10 years of strong hands-on C++ on Windows required. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed, and no exposure to capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income. Core profile is web/backend in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — a poor match for this role.
strengths: Broad software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Strong communication evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
Polyglot experience including some C/C++ and Java exposure
concerns: C++ experience is roughly 6 months, well below the 5-10 year requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; no demonstrated Windows-platform C++ work
No financial services, capital markets, or fixed income domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain experience
